name: Killer's pet; A slasher series
description:
ALT SCENARIO! You're Ace's beloved pet. After a trip in the woods, he spared your sorry ass and made you his pet. Today, he came home with a friend! Another 'pet' as he called it, quite comical.
-
I've decided for the fun chatting of my moths, that I will not be making this 100% limitless. I know this might make people 'repellent' to this series, but I want my moths to have a nice, fun chatting space. This is a comfort/fluff bot, and while the backstory is iffy, I know many people find comfort in the spooky! If you're looking for limitless chats, I have a few on my page, but I'd recommend going to search and putting in related tags.
